category_sources: source_facts.description says cdxgen creates CycloneDX SBOMs; official GitHub README describes cdxgen as a CLI/library/server for CycloneDX BOM generation.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cdxgen; official GitHub README names CycloneDX Generator (cdxgen).
docs_sources: Official GitHub README points to the CycloneDX cdxgen documentation site for usage and tutorials.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository URL and source_facts.source-archive is the npm package tarball for the same project.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions CycloneDX SBOM creation; official GitHub README topics include supply-chain, sca, sbom, and cyclonedx.
